description: Defines the EmailVerificationToken entity class used for email verification processes, including fields for token, user ID, expiration, and used status, with corresponding constructors, getters, and setters.

classes.name: EmailVerificationToken
classes.description: Entity class representing an email verification token, with annotations for ORM mapping.

methods.name: EmailVerificationToken
methods.description: Constructor initializing token, userId, and expiration time.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the ID of the token.

methods.name: getExpiresAt
methods.description: Returns the expiration date and time.

methods.name: setExpiresAt
methods.description: Sets the expiration date and time.

methods.name: isUsed
methods.description: Returns whether the token has been used.

methods.name: setUsed
methods.description: Sets the used status of the token.
